message:
Refactor codegen to use native ast.Node instead of JSON

Agent 3 completed full refactor from JSON-based to union-based AST:
- Removed all JSON parsing code (134 lines eliminated)
- Changed all visitor methods to pattern match on ast.Node union
- Updated helper methods to use enum-based operators

Fixed ArrayList API for Zig 0.15.2 compatibility:
- Changed ArrayList(T).init(allocator) → ArrayList(T){}
- Added allocator parameter to all methods: append, appendSlice, deinit, toOwnedSlice, writer
- Fixed string concatenation to use format buffers
- Added explicit CodegenError type with 15 error variants

Added Zig 0.15.2 breaking changes documentation to CLAUDE.md

Result: Full pipeline working (lexer → parser → codegen → Zig code)
Test: x=5; y=10; z=x+y; print(z) generates valid compilable Zig code

Files: 658 lines (vs 792 original, 17% reduction)
